Internship Mobility

ESN Traineeship Platform

MENU

A web platform has been developed by ESN that aims to bring together students seeking place of traineeship and organizations seeking trainees under Erasmus+:

https://erasmusintern.org

The use of this platform has been accepted by the majority of the countries included in the Erasmus + Program, and the page is promoted by national agencies and other relevant stakeholders.

Students looking for an internship can become a member of the platform and create a profile and apply to the institutions they find suitable for internship proposals, while companies seeking an internship can create internship offers on the platform and offer their internship offers to students whom they find fit.

Click here to download the statement made by Belgium on the subject.
